steps.title: Spot the defining difference
steps.content: The notes provide the key difference between the styles: arista designs are stamped into tiles, while majolica designs are painted directly on tiles.

steps.title: Apply the difference
steps.content: Choice C directly contrasts both methods by placing stamping against painting with whereas. Choices A and B mention both styles without explaining their difference, while D discusses only one style. That matches choice C — C is correct.
